reasoning: CLEAN_BULL ribbon (fast 687.15 > pivot 687.13 > slow 686.86, 28¢ spread exceeds 20¢ threshold) is the dominant structural signal. Price 687.03 sits 10¢ below the pivot EMA, signaling stalled momentum. Last 3 closed bars (15:50, 15:55, 16:00) show 1 green + 2 red — the final bar (16:00) closed with a full 82% body down 23¢, indicating late-session weakness and rejection. Volume spike at 15:55 ET (159,868) followed by pullback from session high 688.33 confirms failed probe of resistance. Sector breadth positive (XLK +0.78%, XLF +1.05%, SPY +0.8%) and VIX falling (−4.55%, MID regime) support risk-on bias. Overnight gap flat (−0.34). Ribbon quality is high, but price momentum and bar weakness temper conviction.
